bead.title: Stage 4.13: Agent sessions + Personas + Commits pages
bead.description: Three routes under src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/. Sessions: token summary + collapsible detail. Personas: split panel (list + detail). Commits: cursor-paginated table with bead cross-links (clickable commit → bead). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #47.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: visit each of the three pages. (2) Sessions: token summary shown, expanding a session shows detail. (3) Personas: list on left, click to show detail on right. (4) Commits: table with pagination, click a commit with bead-refs, land on the bead detail. Record each verification in the completion note.
